title: Oxytes brachypoda
taxonomy: Oxytes brachypoda is a species within the genus Oxytes and the family Cerambycidae, which falls under the order Coleoptera in the class Insecta. This classification reflects the beetle's composition and characteristics. Specifically, Oxytes brachypoda belongs to the kingdom Animalia due to its multicellular, eukaryotic nature. It is further classified under the phylum Arthropoda due to its jointed appendages and segmented body. This comprehensive classification highlights the beetle's unique characteristics and place within the broader biological hierarchy.
